description: Microsoft Defender Antivirus is built into Windows 10 and later and helps protect devices from viruses, malware, and other threats. Make sure that the Windows devices that access organizational resources are protected by configuring Microsoft Defender Antivirus with Microsoft Intune.
userImpact: Microsoft Defender Antivirus runs in the background, ensuring that Windows users are protected from threats, such as viruses and malware.

managementTemplateSteps.displayName: Configure Microsoft Defender Antivirus for Windows 10 and later
managementTemplateSteps.userImpact: Microsoft Defender Antivirus runs in the background, ensuring that Windows users are protected from threats, such as viruses and malware.

informationLinks.displayName: How malware can infect your PC

versions.name: Defender-1

settings.name: name
settings.value: M365 Lighthouse - Setup Microsoft Defender Antivirus Policy for Windows 10 devices

referenceStrings.name: PUAProtection_Off
referenceStrings.displayName: PUA Protection off. Windows Defender will not protect against potentially unwanted applications.

referenceStrings.name: PUAProtection_On
referenceStrings.displayName: PUA Protection on. Detected items are blocked. They will show in history along with other threats.

referenceStrings.name: PUAProtection_AuditMode
referenceStrings.displayName: Audit mode. Windows Defender will detect potentially unwanted applications, but take no action. You can review information about the applications Windows Defender would have taken action against by searching for events created by Windows Defender in the Event Viewer.

referenceStrings.name: AllowRealtimeMonitoring_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Turns off the real-time monitoring service.

referenceStrings.name: AllowRealtimeMonitoring_Allowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Allowed. Turns on and runs the real-time monitoring service.

referenceStrings.name: AllowArchiveScanning_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Turns off scanning on archived files.

referenceStrings.name: AllowUserUIAccess_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Prevents users from accessing UI.

referenceStrings.name: AllowCloudProtection_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Turns off the Microsoft Active Protection Service.

referenceStrings.name: AllowCloudProtection_Allowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Allowed. Turns on the Microsoft Active Protection Service.

referenceStrings.name: AllowBehaviorMonitoring_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Turns off behavior monitoring.

referenceStrings.name: AllowBehaviorMonitoring_Allowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Allowed. Turns on real-time behavior monitoring.

settings.name: allowIOAVProtection
settings.displayName: Allow scanning of all downloaded files and attachments

referenceStrings.name: AllowScanningNetworkFiles_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Turns off scanning of network files.

referenceStrings.name: AllowEmailScanning_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Turns off email scanning.

settings.name: allowFullScanOnMappedNetworkDrives

referenceStrings.name: AllowFullScanOnMappedNetworkDrives_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Disables scanning on mapped network drives.

settings.displayName: Allow Full Scan On Mapped Network Drives

settings.name: allowFullScanRemovableDriveScanning

referenceStrings.name: AllowFullScanRemovableDriveScanning_NotAllowed
referenceStrings.displayName: Not allowed. Turns off scanning on removable drives.

settings.displayName: Allow Full Scan Removable Drive Scanning

settings.name: checkForSignaturesBeforeRunningScan
settings.displayName: Check For Signatures Before Running Scan

values: @sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm,microsoftSense' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"policyId")

@sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /[@sys.notexists("policyId")]beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"oldPolicyId")

@sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm,microsoftSense' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"policyId")

lambdaDefinitions.value: select 'M365 Lighthouse - Setup Microsoft Defender Antivirus Policy for Windows 10 devices'
